title: callmux configuration
description: Configuration for the callmux MCP multiplexer proxy

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for editor autocomplete

servers.description: Downstream MCP servers to proxy (native format)

mcpServers.description: Downstream MCP servers to proxy (MCP-compatible format)

cacheTtlSeconds.description: Cache TTL in seconds for read operations (0 = disabled)

maxConcurrency.description: Max concurrent calls for parallel/batch operations

connectTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for downstream startup connect/list-tools

callTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for downstream tool calls

strictStartup.description: Fail startup if any downstream server fails to connect (default: degraded mode)

maxCacheEntries.description: Maximum cached entries before oldest entries are evicted

metaOnly.description: Hide proxied tools, expose only meta-tools (callmux_call, parallel, batch, etc.)

descriptionMaxLength.description: Default max chars for tool descriptions in callmux_status (omit = no limit)

serverConfig.description: Downstream MCP server configuration — either stdio (command) or HTTP (url)

command.description: Command to launch the MCP server process

env.description: Environment variables for the server process

cwd.description: Working directory for the server process

tools.description: Whitelist of tool names to expose (omit to expose all)

maxConcurrency.description: Max concurrent calls to this server (omit to use global maxConcurrency)

url.description: URL of the remote MCP server

transport.description: Transport protocol (auto-detected with fallback if omitted)

headers.description: HTTP headers sent with requests (e.g. authorization)

tools.description: Whitelist of tool names to expose (omit to expose all)

maxConcurrency.description: Max concurrent calls to this server (omit to use global maxConcurrency)

cachePolicy.description: Cache policy controlling which tools are cached. Supports exact names or trailing '*' wildcards.

allowTools.description: Only cache matching tools (exact names or 'prefix*' wildcards)

denyTools.description: Never cache matching tools (exact names or 'prefix*' wildcards). Takes precedence over allowTools.
